Box Reference Guide

AEROTHAI ICAO FAA Position
Box 1 A #4 AWAY RWY - Lowest Angle
Box 2 B #3
Box 3 C #2
Box 4 D #1 CLOSE RWY - Highest Angle

DDM ↔ µA Annex 10

Convert DDM (Difference in Depth of Modulation) to/from µA based on ICAO Annex 10.
📡 LOCALIZER
FSD: 0.155 DDM = 150 µA
↔
−150 µA 0 +150 µA
📐 GLIDESLOPE
FSD: 0.175 DDM = 150 µA
↔
−150 µA 0 +150 µA
ICAO Annex 10 Reference
ParameterLOCGS
FSD DDM0.1550.175
FSD µA150150
Scale Factor967.74 µA/DDM857.14 µA/DDM

RF Arc (Radius to Fix)

Calculate coordinates along a curved PBN RF leg

Arc Generator

Calculate coordinates along a curved path (RF leg) around a center point at a given radius.
Center Point
START/END BY:
Start Waypoint
End Waypoint
# Radial Lat (DMS) Lon (DMS) Lat (DMM) Lon (DMM)
📱 ForeFlight Export
Export as user_waypoints.csv for bulk import into ForeFlight. Lat/Lon in decimal degrees.
Waypoint names: PREFIX_R090, PREFIX_R093, etc. • All caps, min 3 chars • File: user_waypoints.csv
